title: Fix initialization treated as continuous assignment

features.name: two_state_variable_initialized_with_signal
features.description: Code should include a two-state variable (bit) that is initialized with an input signal port

features.name: initialized_two_state_var_in_continuous_assign_binary_expr
features.description: Code should include a two-state variable initialized with a signal, then used in a continuous assignment with a binary operator and another signal
features.snippet:
bit internal = in;
assign out = internal | in2;
